name: Windows Update / Component Servicing History
categoryDescription: Application installation, execution history, compatibility configuration, and OS version information.
description: Component-Based Servicing (CBS) package history — all installed and pending Windows Update packages.
forensic_value: Establishes patch level at time of incident. Missing critical patches (especially for exploited CVEs) corroborates a specific exploitation vector. CBS history persists longer than Windows Update history in Event Logs.
